notes: This policy authorizes continuous bounded current-NAV/SL-risk-sized forward evidence collection from either a reproducible contrarian forecast-failure hypothesis or the current content-addressed bid/ask forecast-orientation learner. Historical evidence ranks the prediction; it does not prove the passive LIMIT fill vehicle. DISCOVERY starts at no more than 0.10% current NAV risk; only normalized exact-vehicle forward R evidence can step the cap toward 1.00%. OANDA integer units down to 1u are allowed when spread, geometry, post-cost expectancy, and every risk gate pass; small absolute contribution is compensated through up to the campaign target pace of 30 independent reservations, never by bypassing cooldown or duplicate-signal rules. Every vehicle+forecast-cycle signal is atomically claimed before POST; the attached TP/SL and verifier-bound units are not modified by adaptive position paths. A loss forces six-hour backoff; three losses with cumulative negative net quarantine the stable selector/exit vehicle. Promotion requires all resolved forward exits with no duplicate-signal anomaly; this policy does not permit MARKET entries or relax spread/news/margin/guardian gates.
